case_number: constitution petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-1049 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Hearing/priority 1. For orders on office objection as at ”A” 2. For hearing of CMA No.7617/2023 3. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------- 27.02.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Khan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Zardari, A.A.G. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. PI Kashif Baig of PS Nazimabad ------------------------------------------- Petitioner has filed instant constitution petition for recovery of his wife, namely, Mst. Saima Mustafa, who has been detained against her wishes by her brother/respondent No.1 Rana Murtaza son of Ghulam Mustafa and other family members. Learned A.A.G. submits that as per report she has been detained in Faisalabad. Question of maintainability of instant petition has been raised on the point of territorial jurisdiction. At this juncture, counsel for petitioner does not press this constitution petition and intends to approach learned Lahore High Court for redressal of his grievance, in accordance with law. In view of such position, instant constitution petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
